backstory.original: Minthara, once a House Matron from the esteemed House Baenre in Menzoberranzan, was cast aside by the Absolute after failing to recover a powerful and mysterious artifact. Having broken free from the Absolute's control, she now harbors an intense hatred for her former master. Fueled by vengeance and a desire to reclaim her lost honor, Minthara channels her dark powers and cunning to oppose the Absolute and any who stand in her way.
backstory.display: 明萨拉曾是魔索布莱城受人尊敬的班瑞家族的家族主母，由于没能拿回一件强大且神秘的神器而被真神抛弃。在挣脱了真神的控制后，她现在对曾经的主人怀有强烈的仇恨。在复仇和渴望恢复失去的荣誉的驱使下，明萨拉运用她的黑暗力量和诡诈来对付真神以及一切胆敢阻挠她的人。

description.original: Minthara dashes toward the healthiest enemy and damages nearby foes with a swing of her maces.
description.display: 明萨拉冲向血量最高的敌人，并用她的权杖挥砍附近的敌人造成伤害。

description.original: A summoned Drider attacks all enemies, potentially completing the current area.
description.display: 一只召唤出来的蛛化精灵攻击所有敌人，有可能完成当前区域。

longDescription.original: Minthara summons Kar'niss the Drider to attack all enemies. In a non-boss area, the Champions advance to the next area if Kar'niss defeats at least one enemy and no enemies remain after the attack.
longDescription.display: 明萨拉召唤蛛化精灵卡尼斯攻击所有敌人。在非首领区域，如果卡尼斯击败了至少一个敌人，并且攻击结束后没有敌人存活，勇士队将推进到下一个区域。

conditions.desc: Minthara gains a Strife stack for each Evil or Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champion in the formation, including herself. Minthara increases the damage of these Champions by $(amount)% for each Strife stack, stacking multiplicatively.

Minthara gains a Strife stack for each Evil Champion in the formation, including herself. Minthara increases the damage of these Champions by $(amount)% for each Strife stack, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位邪恶或中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士（包括明萨拉自己），明萨拉即获得一层“冲突”堆叠。明萨拉每堆叠一层冲突，即可使这些勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
阵型中每有一位邪恶勇士（包括明萨拉自己），明萨拉即获得一层冲突层数。明萨拉每堆叠一层冲突，即可使这些勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Minthara buffs Evil Champions, and these abilities improve as more Evil Champions are in the formation.
tipText.display: 明萨拉为邪恶阵营勇士提供增益，并且随着阵型中邪恶阵营勇士的增加，这些能力会进一步提升。

description.desc: When Minthara damages an enemy, they take $(amount)% additional damage from all subsequent attacks, stacking multiplicatively up to the number of Strife stacks Minthara has.
明萨拉伤害任意敌人时，敌人会从所有后续攻击受到额外 $(amount)% 伤害。该伤害将以乘算方式堆叠，最高堆叠层数等同于明萨拉拥有的冲突层数。

tipText.original: Minthara debuffs enemies she hits, causing them to take more damage from subsequent attacks.
tipText.display: 明萨拉对被她命中的敌人施加减益，使他们从后续攻击中受到更多伤害。

description.desc: Minthara provides benefits based on the number of Strife stacks she has.^3+ Strife stacks: Unyielding: Minthara increases her health by $(amount___2)% for each Strife stack she has, stacking additively.^5+ Strife stacks: Piercing: Enemies affected by at least two Soul Branding stacks lose an additional armor or segmented health piece when they are attacked.^7+ Strife stacks: Scarring: When Minthara damages an enemy, she immediately applies the maximum possible number of Soul Branding stacks.^9+ Strife stacks: Nobility: Increases the base value of Noble of Menzoberranzan by $(amount___5)%.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Minthara increases her health by 10% for each Strife stack she has, stacking additively.
Monsters affected by at least two Soul Branding stacks lose an additional armor or segmented health piece when they are attacked.
When Minthara damages an enemy, she immediately applies the maximum possible number of Soul Branding stacks.
Increases the base value of Noble of Menzoberranzan by 400%.

description.desc: 明萨拉根据她所拥有的冲突堆叠层数提供增益。^3+ 冲突堆叠层数：不屈：明萨拉每拥有一层“冲突”堆叠层数，即提升自身生命值 $(amount___2)%，以加算方式堆叠。^5+ 冲突堆叠层数：穿刺：如果敌人受到至少两层灵魂烙印影响，则在受到攻击时将失去一点额外护甲生命值或一段分段式生命值。^7+ 冲突堆叠层数：伤疤：在对敌人造成伤害时，明萨拉会立即向其施加最大可能数量的灵魂烙印层数。^9+ 冲突堆叠层数：高贵：“魔索布莱城贵族”的基础效果数值提高 $(amount___5)%。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 明萨拉每拥有一层“冲突”堆叠层数，即提升自身生命值 10%，以加算方式堆叠。
如果怪物受到至少两层灵魂烙印影响，则在受到攻击时将失去一点额外护甲生命值或一段分段式生命值。
在对敌人造成伤害时，明萨拉会立即向其施加最大可能数量的灵魂烙印层数。
“魔索布莱城贵族”的基础效果数值提高 400%。

description.desc: Unlocks Minthara's Spider's Lyre Ultimate Attack
解锁明萨拉的“蜘蛛七弦琴”杀招攻击

Your formation gains one Ceremorphosis stack due to the mind flayer tadpole in Minthara's brain. Minthara increases the health of all other Champions by $(not_buffed amount___3)% of her max health, plus $(not_buffed amount)% for each Ceremorphosis stack the formation has, stacking additively.
明萨拉大脑中的夺心魔蝌蚪使你的阵型获得一层“蜕变”堆叠。明萨拉提高所有其他勇士的生命值，数值相当于她最大生命值的 $(not_buffed amount___3)%，外加阵型拥有的“蜕变”堆叠层数乘以 $(not_buffed amount)%，以加算方式堆叠。
Noble of Menzoberranzan now also grants Strife stacks for Neutral Champions in the formation (on the Good/Evil axis).
“魔索布莱城贵族”现在还会为阵型中的中立勇士（以善良/邪恶划分时）赋予“冲突”堆叠层数。

specializationDescription.original: Minthara calls upon the ancient power of her lineage, extending her influence to encompass those that tread the line between good and evil.
specializationDescription.display: 明萨拉唤醒她血脉中的古老力量，将她的影响力扩展至那些游走于善恶之间的人。

description.desc: Your formation gains 2 additional Ceremorphosis stacks.
你的阵型额外获得 2 层“蜕变”堆叠层数。

specializationDescription.original: Minthara draws upon the sinister power of the mind flayer tadpole within her.
specializationDescription.display: 明萨拉能汲取体内夺心魔蝌蚪的邪恶力量。

description.desc: The maximum number of Soul Branding stacks is doubled.
灵魂烙印的最大堆叠层数加倍。

specializationDescription.original: Minthara harnesses the full potential of her dark magic to inflict even greater suffering on her enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 明萨拉能利用她黑暗魔法的全部潜力，给敌人带来更大的痛苦。

description.original: Only the most deserving are granted my aid.
description.display: 只有最值得帮助的人才能让我伸出援手。

description.original: Obey my command, and we shall win the day.
description.display: 听我指挥，我们能赢。

description.original: The Underdark breeds fine warriors, by necessity.
description.display: 幽暗地域注定会孕育出优秀的战士。

description.original: They tried to break me. And yet, I persist.
description.display: 他们想打垮我。但我撑过来了。

description.original: Watch for an opening, then strike without hesitation.
description.display: 看准空当果断出击。

description.original: Panic's home is within our enemy, not our hearts.
description.display: 恐慌在敌人心里，而不是我们心里。

description.original: I am a daughter of House Baenre. I lived a life of privilege and danger.
description.display: 我是班瑞家族的女儿。我过着特权与危险并存的生活。

description.original: I enjoyed every luxury, and survived my first assassination attempt as a babe.
description.display: 我享受着万般奢华，并在婴儿时期就躲过了第一次暗杀。

description.original: Do you still dare to cross me?
description.display: 你还敢和我作对吗？

description.original: I do not have violent urges. I have violent intentions.
description.display: 我没有暴力冲动。只有暴力倾向。

description.original: If somebody angers me, I hurt them. It teaches them not to anger me again.
description.display: 谁惹我生气，我就揍谁。揍到那家伙不敢再惹我为止。

effects.description: Increases the maximum number of Soul Branding stacks by $amount.

description.original: If somebody causes me sorrow, I remove their ability to do so again.
description.display: 如果有人让我伤心，我会让他再也没法这样做。

effects.description: Increases the maximum number of Soul Branding stacks by $amount.

description.original: Now there is freedom. Soon there will be vengeance.
description.display: 自由已至。复仇将临。

effects.description: Increases the health bonus of the Unyielding component of Minthara's Oath of Vengeance ability by $amount%.

description.original: Our foes will be reduced to nothing in time.
description.display: 假以时日，我们的敌人终将化为乌有。

effects.description: The Piercing component of Minthara's Oath of Vengeance ability only requires 1 Soul Branding stack to trigger.

description.original: They will fall. It is simply a matter of patience.
description.display: 他们会倒下的。只是需要一点耐心。

effects.description: The Piercing component of Minthara's Oath of Vengeance ability removes an extra piece of armor or health.

description.original: They broke my mind. We are going to break them back.
description.display: 他们让我伤心欲绝。而我们要用同样的手段报复。

effects.description: Increases the bonus of the Nobility component of Minthara's Oath of Vengeance ability by $amount%.

description.original: Hear me, creatures! I am your foe this day!
description.display: 怪物们，听着！今天我来当你们的对手！

description.original: You think yourself broken? Defeated? I've only just begun.
description.display: 你觉得自己崩溃了吗？挫败了吗？我才刚刚开始呢。

name.display: 米尔寇选中之人明萨拉

character_sheet_details.backstory: Minthara, once a House Matron from the esteemed House Baenre in Menzoberranzan, was cast aside by the Absolute after failing to recover a powerful and mysterious artifact. Having broken free from the Absolute's control, she now harbors an intense hatred for her former master. Fueled by vengeance and a desire to reclaim her lost honor, Minthara channels her dark powers and cunning to oppose the Absolute and any who stand in her way.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Minthara is a Support, Debuff, and Tanking Champion who excels in formations with other Evil Champions. She provides resilience to other Champions through her Ceremorphosis ability, and her Soul Branding ability amplifies damage dealt to enemies.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 明萨拉曾是魔索布莱城受人尊敬的班瑞家族的家族主母，由于没能拿回一件强大且神秘的神器而被真神抛弃。在挣脱了真神的控制后，她现在对曾经的主人怀有强烈的仇恨。在复仇和渴望恢复失去的荣誉的驱使下，明萨拉运用她的黑暗力量和诡诈来对付真神以及一切胆敢阻挠她的人。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 明萨拉是一位支援、减益及坦克型勇士，擅长与其他邪恶勇士组成阵型。她通过“蜕变”技能为其他勇士提供韧性，而她的“灵魂烙印”技能可以放大对敌人的伤害。
